schema.actor: actor_id, actor_type, name, affiliation, position_spectrum, active_period, is_anonymized
schema.event: event_id, event_date, event_type, issue_tags, actor_id, title, summary, related_pi, related_co, related_article, is_positive_outcome
schema.causal_link: from_event, to_event, link_type, evidence_strength, chain_depth, counter_evidence, multi_causal_note
schema.outcome_indicator: indicator_id, event_id, metric_name, before_value, after_value, direction, confounders
schema.law: law_id, law_name_zh, law_pcode, enacted_date, primary_agency, covers_articles
schema.law_article_change: change_id, version_id, article_number, change_type, text_before, text_after, reason, related_co, related_article
